symptom_vector: High memory usage, memory saturation, memory exhaustion, memory leak, memory stress

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [paymentservice] (From Ground Truth)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [could, not, load] in Log (From GT key_observations) - PluginLoader load plugin errors in paymentservice logs
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_processes] in Metric (From GT key_observations) - All paymentservice instances show pod_processes changes with p99_change_ratio 0.6667
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_memory_working_set_bytes] in Metric (From GT key_observations) - This is the key_metric indicating memory stress
Step 5: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [pod_memory_working_set_bytes] (From Ground Truth)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: PluginLoader#load: could not load plugin @opentelemetry/plugin-http of module http. Error: Cannot find module '@opentelemetry/plugin-http' appears in paymentservice logs
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'could not load' in paymentservice logs to identify plugin loading failures

critical_checks.expected_pattern: paymentservice-0/1/2 pod_processes p99_change_ratio = 0.6667 (from 1.0 to 2.0) indicating process count changes
critical_checks.instruction: Check metric [pod_processes] for paymentservice instances to detect process count anomalies

critical_checks.expected_pattern: High values or rapid increase in pod_memory_working_set_bytes for paymentservice instances
critical_checks.instruction: Monitor metric [pod_memory_working_set_bytes] for paymentservice to detect memory stress conditions
